title: Austin apartment hunt 2025
html: Stub. The August 2025 phase of the Austin move — applying to listings via Tenant Turner / Joseph Companies, scoping Wooten Village 1BRs in the $745–$795 range, paying $45 application fees. Concrete step between the May/Jul "I'm moving to Austin" planning docs and the September arrival summaries.

related.label: Joseph Companies $45 application fee — Austin apartment
Wooten Village 1BR rental — $745 move-in special, Austin
